headline: A Look Back at Consumer Discretionary - Footwear Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Nike (NYSE:NKE) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at consumer discretionary - footwear stocks, starting with Nike (NYSE:NKE).

headline: Headed Into Earnings, Nike Stock Is Trading Lower Than It Was a Decade Ago. But Is the Turnaround Finally Working?
summary: The athletic-apparel giant's recovery is gaining traction in one major market, even as another continues to shrink.

headline: UBS Trims Nike (NKE) Forecast, Cites Concerns over Upcoming Guidance
summary: NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stocks to Buy According to Reddit. On June 10, UBS lowered its price recommendation on NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) to $50 from $54. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the stock. Analyst Jay Sole said he sees a “slightly negative upside/downside skew” heading into […]
